ksa_text: Skill in interpreting regulatory text, supervisory guidance, and enforcement decisions, translating legal requirements into operational controls and measurable organizational obligations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and apply laws, regulations, policies, and guidance relevant to organization cyber objectives.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of targeting laws and regulations

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to interpret and apply laws, regulations, policies, and guidance relevant to organization cyber objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Governance. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.457). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Governance versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Governance.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance skill KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Governance at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
